channel.title: PrimitiveKit – Feedback
channel.description: Recent content in Feedback on PrimitiveKit

item.title: Alert
item.description:
Alert

Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.

Import 

import { AlertComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-alert>Content</pk-alert>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Alert component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-alert [style]="{
 '--alert-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--alert-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-alert>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --alert-padding
  • --alert-border-radius
  • --alert-border-width
  • --alert-icon-color
  • --alert-text-color
  • --solid
  • --info
  • --alert-bg-color
  • --subtle
  • --left-accent
  • … and 5 more

Accessibility

The Alert component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Alert
item.description:
Alert

Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.

Import 

import { Alert } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Alert>Content</Alert>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Alert component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Alert style={{
'--alert-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--alert-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Alert>

  • --alert-padding
  • --alert-border-radius
  • --alert-border-width
  • --alert-icon-color
  • --alert-text-color
  • --solid
  • --info
  • --alert-bg-color
  • --subtle
  • --left-accent
  • … and 5 more

Accessibility

The Alert component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference

item.title: Alert
item.description:
Alert

Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.

Import 

import Alert from '@primitivekit/svelte/Alert.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Alert>Content</Alert>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Alert component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Alert style={{
 '--alert-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--alert-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Alert>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --alert-padding
  • --alert-border-radius
  • --alert-border-width
  • --alert-icon-color
  • --alert-text-color
  • --solid
  • --info
  • --alert-bg-color
  • --subtle
  • --left-accent
  • … and 5 more

Accessibility

The Alert component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference

item.title: Alert
item.description:
Alert

Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.

Import 

import { Alert } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const alert = new Alert({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(alert.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Alert component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const alert = new Alert({
 style: {
 '--alert-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--alert-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --alert-padding
  • --alert-border-radius
  • --alert-border-width
  • --alert-icon-color
  • --alert-text-color
  • --solid
  • --info
  • --alert-bg-color
  • --subtle
  • --left-accent
  • … and 5 more

Accessibility

The Alert component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Alert
item.description:
Alert

Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.

Import 

import { Alert } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Alert>Content</Alert>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Alert component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Alert style={{
 '--alert-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--alert-text-color': '#ffffff'

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --alert-border-radius
  • --alert-border-width
  • --alert-icon-color
  • --alert-text-color
  • --solid
  • --info
  • --alert-bg-color
  • --subtle
  • --left-accent
  • … and 5 more

Accessibility

The Alert component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Badge
item.description:
Badge

Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.

Import 

import { BadgeComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-badge>Content</pk-badge>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Badge component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-badge [style]="{
 '--badge-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--badge-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-badge>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --badge-padding-x
  • --badge-padding-y
  • --badge-font-size
  • --badge-font-weight
  • --badge-border-radius
  • --badge-border-width
  • --small
  • --large
  • --solid
  • --primary
  • … and 10 more

Accessibility

The Badge component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.

item.title: Badge
item.description:
Badge

Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.

Import 

import { Badge } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const badge = new Badge({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(badge.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Badge component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const badge = new Badge({
 style: {
 '--badge-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--badge-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --badge-padding-x
  • --badge-padding-y
  • --badge-font-size
  • --badge-font-weight
  • --badge-border-radius
  • --badge-border-width
  • --small
  • --large
  • --solid
  • --primary

The Badge component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

item.title: Progress
item.description:
Progress

Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

Import 

import { ProgressComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-progress>Content</pk-progress>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Progress component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-progress [style]="{
 '--progress-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--progress-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-progress>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --progress-height
  • --progress-bg-color
  • --progress-fill-color
  • --progress-border-radius
  • --small
  • --large
  • --indeterminate

Accessibility

The Progress component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.description:
Progress

Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

Import

No props available.

  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

item.title: Progress
item.description:
Progress

Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

Import 

import { Progress } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const progress = new Progress({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(progress.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Progress component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const progress = new Progress({
 style: {
 '--progress-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--progress-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --progress-height
  • --progress-bg-color
  • --progress-fill-color
  • --progress-border-radius
  • --small
  • --large
  • --indeterminate

Accessibility

The Progress component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide

  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Skeleton
item.description:
Skeleton

Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

Import 

import { SkeletonComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-skeleton>Content</pk-skeleton>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Skeleton component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-skeleton [style]="{
 '--skeleton-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--skeleton-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-skeleton>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --skeleton-bg-color
  • --skeleton-animation-duration
  • --skeleton-width
  • --skeleton-height
  • --skeleton-border-radius
  • --text
  • --rectangular
  • --circular
  • --circle

Accessibility

The Skeleton component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Skeleton
item.description:
Skeleton

Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

Import 

import { Skeleton } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Skeleton>Content</Skeleton>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Skeleton component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Skeleton style={{
'--skeleton-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--skeleton-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Skeleton>

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --skeleton-bg-color
  • --skeleton-animation-duration
  • --skeleton-width
  • --skeleton-height
  • --skeleton-border-radius
  • --text
  • --rectangular
  • --circular
  • --circle

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible

  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Skeleton
item.description:
Skeleton

Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

Import 

import Skeleton from '@primitivekit/svelte/Skeleton.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Skeleton>Content</Skeleton>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Skeleton component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Skeleton style={{
 '--skeleton-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--skeleton-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Skeleton>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --skeleton-bg-color
  • --skeleton-animation-duration
  • --skeleton-width
  • --skeleton-height
  • --skeleton-border-radius
  • --text
  • --rectangular
  • --circular
  • --circle

Accessibility

The Skeleton component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Skeleton
item.description:
Skeleton

Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

Import 

import { Skeleton } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const skeleton = new Skeleton({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(skeleton.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Skeleton component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const skeleton = new Skeleton({
 style: {
 '--skeleton-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--skeleton-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --skeleton-bg-color
  • --skeleton-animation-duration
  • --skeleton-width
  • --skeleton-height
  • --skeleton-border-radius
  • --text
  • --rectangular
  • --circular
  • --circle

Accessibility

The Skeleton component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Skeleton
item.description:
Skeleton

Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

Import 

import { Skeleton } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Skeleton>Content</Skeleton>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Skeleton component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Skeleton style={{
 '--skeleton-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--skeleton-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Skeleton>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --skeleton-bg-color
  • --skeleton-animation-duration
  • --skeleton-width
  • --skeleton-height
  • --skeleton-border-radius
  • --text
  • --rectangular
  • --circular
  • --circle

Accessibility

The Skeleton component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Spinner - Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Spinner
item.description:
Spinner

Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.

Import 

import { SpinnerComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-spinner>Content</pk-spinner>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Spinner component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-spinner [style]="{
 '--spinner-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--spinner-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-spinner>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --spinner-size
  • --spinner-color
  • --spinner-border-width
  • --spinner-speed
  • --border
  • --dots
  • --small
  • --medium
  • --large
  • --xlarge

Accessibility

The Spinner component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component

Related Components

  • Alert - Feedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.
  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.
  • Progress - Feedback component for showing the completion progress of a task or operation.
  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Spinner
item.description:
Spinner

Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.

Import 

import { Spinner } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Spinner>Content</Spinner>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Spinner component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Spinner style={{
'--spinner-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--spinner-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Spinner>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --spinner-size
  • --spinner-color
  • --spinner-border-width
  • --spinner-speed
  • --border
  • --dots
  • --small
  • --medium
  • --large
  • --xlarge

  • ✅ Screen reader compatible

  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.

item.title: Spinner
item.description:
Spinner

Loading indicator component for showing that content is being loaded or processed.

Import 

import { Spinner } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const spinner = new Spinner({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(spinner.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Spinner component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const spinner = new Spinner({
 style: {
 '--spinner-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--spinner-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --spinner-size
  • --spinner-color
  • --spinner-border-width
  • --spinner-speed
  • --border
  • --dots
  • --small
  • --medium
  • --large
  • --xlarge

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible

  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

  • Badge - Small label component for displaying status, counts, or categories.

  • Skeleton - Placeholder component for showing loading states with animated skeleton screens.
